THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BASED ON JURY'S SPECIAL VERDICT, PLTF J/EID SHALL RECOVER FROM DEFT CCSF THE AMT OF $142.04; PLTF R/EDAIS SHALL TAKE NOTHING ON HIS COMPLT AGAINST DEFT CCSF. DEFT CCSF SHALL RECOVER COSTS IN THE AMT OF $1882.00 AS PROVIDED BY STATUTE PURS TO CCP 1141.21.
